org.apache.paimon.options.description

Class HtmlFormatter

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.paimon.options.description.Formatter
      • org.apache.paimon.options.description.HtmlFormatter

  • public class HtmlFormatter
extends Formatter
    Formatter that transforms Description into Html representation.
